summary: Comprehensive testing completed for AuraGraph AI Study Buddy platform. Tested authentication, notebook management, AI integrations, and complete user workflows. All core functionality working excellently.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 404 when trying to update non-existent graph node

passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint
User registration and login authentication
Notebook CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
AI Knowledge Fusion endpoint with high-quality output
AI Note Mutation endpoint
AI Concept Examiner endpoint
Concept extraction and graph generation
Login page renders with email and password fields
User registration flow with email and password validation
Dashboard page with 'My Notebooks' heading after login
Create notebook modal with name and course inputs
Notebook cards display correctly on dashboard
Clicking notebook card navigates to workspace page
Notebook workspace shows file upload zones
Proficiency level selector (Beginner/Intermediate/Advanced) functionality
Right sidebar with Concepts and Doubts tabs switching
Back to dashboard button navigation
Notebook deletion from dashboard with hover interaction
User logout functionality and redirect to login
Search notebooks functionality
Generate notes button properly disabled without files
Tab switching between Concepts and Doubts views
Proficiency level selection and visual feedback
Empty state handling for concepts and doubts tabs

success_percentage.ai_integration: 100% (all AI endpoints responding with quality output)
